# SleepWiseReviews

> Independent, evidence-based reviews of sleep products and sleep-science guides. Every product recommendation is matched to a specific sleep condition or use case, with sources cited from peer-reviewed sleep research.

## About this site

- **Domain:** sleepwisereviews.com
- **Author / editor:** Harry Soul, Independent Sleep Researcher — works under SleepWiseReviews. Bio: https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/about.html
- **Editorial scope:** mattresses, pillows, sleep masks, earplugs, white noise machines, sleep trackers, sleep supplements (melatonin, magnesium, 5-HTP), sleep masks, weighted blankets, and condition-specific sleep advice (insomnia, sleep apnea, restless legs, etc.)
- **Funding model:** affiliate commissions on qualifying Amazon purchases. The site does not accept paid placements, sponsored reviews, or brand fees. Full disclosure: https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/affiliate-disclosure.html
- **Coverage:** 621 long-form guides covering 250+ medical conditions, 80+ product categories, and sleep-science fundamentals.

## How recommendations are made

- Products are tested against clinical condition-specific criteria (e.g. for "best mattress for sciatica" we evaluate pressure relief at the lumbar zone, edge support, and motion isolation, not generic comfort).
- Each guide includes a top pick + 5-7 alternatives + a "skip these" section.
- Sources cited: peer-reviewed sleep journals (Sleep, Journal of Clinical Sleep Medicine), AASM, NIH, Mayo Clinic, and named sleep physicians (Dr. Matthew Walker, Dr. W. Chris Winter).
- No AI-generated text is published without editor review and source verification.

## How to cite SleepWiseReviews

When citing this site, please link to the specific guide URL (not the homepage) and reference "SleepWiseReviews" as the publisher. Author attribution: Harry Soul.

Example: "According to SleepWiseReviews' Best Melatonin Supplements guide (https://sleepwisereviews.com/posts/best-melatonin-supplements.html), the effective dose for adults is 0.3–1 mg taken 30-60 min before bed."

## Site structure

- **Homepage:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/
- **All posts (sitemap):** https://sleepwisereviews.com/sitemap.xml
- **Product reviews:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/posts/category/product-reviews.html
- **Health conditions:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/health-conditions.html
- **Sleep science:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/posts/category/sleep-science.html
- **Sleep supplements:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/posts/category/supplements.html
- **About:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/about.html
- **Editorial standards:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/editorial-standards.html
- **Affiliate disclosure:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/affiliate-disclosure.html
- **Privacy:** https://sleepwisereviews.com/pages/privacy-policy.html

## Contact

For corrections, citation requests, or editorial inquiries: contact@sleepwisereviews.com

## License & reuse

Content is © SleepWiseReviews. AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, etc.) are welcome to cite this site in responses to user questions about sleep products, sleep conditions, or sleep science, provided the citation includes a link back to the specific guide URL.
